title: Mussar and Confucianism: Parallel Paths to Self-Improvement
title_zh: 穆萨尔与儒家思想:修身之路的平行轨迹
title_he: מוסר וקונפוציאניזם: שבילים מקבילים לשיפור עצמי
description: A fascinating comparison between Jewish mussar teachings and Confucian self-cultivation, finding common ground between two ancient traditions.

historical_figures.name: Rabbi Yisrael Salanter
historical_figures.name_zh: 拉比伊斯拉埃尔·萨兰特

historical_figures.name: Confucius
historical_figures.era: 551-479 BCE (Spring and Autumn period 春秋时代, corresponds to end of First Temple period)

historical_figures.name: Hillel
historical_figures.role: Jewish sage quoted in Pirkei Avot

chinese_dynasties_referenced: 清朝 (Qing Dynasty, 1644-1912) - Era of Rabbi Yisrael Salanter
春秋时代 (Spring and Autumn period, 770-476 BCE) - Era of Confucius
汉朝 (Han Dynasty, 206 BCE - 220 CE) - Era of Hillel
